task: Read brief.md. Create slides.md: the complete slide deck for the 10-minute pitch described there (audience: VP Engineering + CFO delegate; decision sought: approve the $180K Nightshift pilot budget). Format each slide as: a '## ' heading line for the slide title, then the slide body (at most 30 words, or a one-line [exhibit: ...] note). The deck must fit the 10-minute slot, build a persuasive case from the brief's facts only, and end with a concrete ask.

Read question.md and the three evidence excerpts in sources/. Write assessment.md, at most 550 words: assess the evidence and recommend adopt / pilot / reject the 4-day workweek for this specific company (40-person B2B SaaS, 28 async-friendly product/engineering, 12 in coverage-bound 24/5 support and ops). Weigh the quality and biases of each source; state what the evidence does NOT establish; address the strongest case AGAINST your recommendation; commit to a recommendation with stated confidence.
